历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 27373 → 19379 → 18602 → 17567 → 14083, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past 3 years, the cumulative advancement was about 4520 places, with a baseline of about 14083 in 2025, indicating increasing popularity year by year. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian Province was 52 in 2021, 51 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 53 in 2024, and 53 in 2025. In 2026, Physics Category has 47 places plus 5 for Medical Category, totaling 52, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 46th, with recent rankings stable in the 40-46 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, involving a campus safety incident (a male student maliciously using female classmates' photos), which may slightly affect candidates' confidence in applying. On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 46th, rated as relatively hot, with some exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has A- in Sports Science and A- in Pharmacy, totaling 2 A- or above disciplines. Disciplines such as Materials Science and Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Computer Science are relatively strong but not in the A category, with overall disciplinary competitiveness at the mid-level of 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, matching Soochow University's advantageous engineering fields. The number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from about 117,000 in 2021 to about 192,000 in 2025, with a total of 267,900 candidates in 2026. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 204,000, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu, which is a cross-province application. The university's enrollment plan in Fujian Province accounts for a small proportion (about 52 places), not a major source of local students, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 14083, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (52 vs 53), the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province (about +6%), and the slightly negative reputation, after adjustments for candidate scale growth, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 14124, with a range of 13624-14624.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业历来是高考报考热门方向，临床医学尤其受到高分考生青睐。苏州大学地处长三角核心城市苏州，地理位置优越，经济发达，就业前景良好，进一步增强了医学类专 业的吸引力。2026年福建省医学类仅保留临床医学核心专业，无护理学、药学等相对低分专业，整体录取门槛将显著抬升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及历年位次趋势分析，预测2026年苏州大学医学类在福建省最低录取位次约为9151名，波动区间为8691至9611名。2026年医学类大幅缩招且仅保留临床 医学专业，预计录取位次较2025年进一步上升（位次数字减小），竞争更加激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Soochow University's medical category in Fujian Province from 2021 to 2025 were 27373, 19379, 18602, 17567, and 14083 respectively, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year, competition intensifying). In terms of enrollment plans, there were 12 students in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 14 in 2025, remaining generally stable. In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is significantly reduced to 5 students, retaining only Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) with 3 students and Clinical Medicine with 2 students, a reduction of 9 students from 14 in 2025, a contraction rate of 64.3%, which will significantly impact admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a key construction university under Project 211 and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical discipline has a long history, with outstanding strength in Clinical Medicine, enjoying a high reputation in the East China region, and has strong appeal to Fujian Province candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors have always been a popular direction for college entrance examinations, with Clinical Medicine particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with superior geographical location, developed economy, and good employment prospects, further enhancing the appeal of medical majors. In 2026, Fujian Province's medical category only retains core Clinical Medicine majors, with no relatively low-scoring majors such as Nursing or Pharmacy, significantly raising the overall admission threshold.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Soochow University's medical category in Fujian Province in 2026 will be approximately 9151, with a fluctuation range of 8691 to 9611. In 2026, due to the significant reduction in medical enrollment and retention of only Clinical Medicine majors, the admission ranking is expected to further increase (ranking number decreasing), making competition more intense.
